{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231754077C13ECD925FBAC382C30"}"},"total":3007},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7262777736878654244","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第二百二十七章，一口气看到这里，怎么说了，除了有很多错漏字以外，总体上算的上尚佳，故事还是挺吸引人的，趣味性很足，是不是能将我逗乐！给个好评，作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690997495,"group_id":"7241145924909534248","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"首先，我不主动骂人的，但要是有人上前找骂，我也不会吝啬的。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9exdeWSjbgWKGXI3seuOLdiBpb7KLKnnYF8Y8mnZu4Y","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/29e3be43f86d48a4b72ccf7d46895e9e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788020&x-signature=Zvowdmvh5f1ynRgznzEE51s%2Bdqs%3D","user_id":"1877615699833768","user_name":"嫈葕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1877615699833768","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7241145924909534248","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：王骁穿越汉末，获得无双谋士系统，但奖励却是武力值拉满，并且还要他成为一名谋士才能永久获得。
　　无奈之下王骁只能来到曹操这里，应聘谋士，但上岗第一天就当着曹操的面把典韦给暴打了一顿。
　　典韦：“我有想过自己会输，但我没想过我会输给一个谋士！”
　　吕布：“曹操麾下当真是没人了，居然让一个谋士出战……卧槽！锤下留人，吕布愿降！”
　　关羽：“王先生请你站起来一下，很好，在座的诸位都不过是插标卖首！”
　　曹操：“所以你就是这样当军师的？”
　　王骁：“你就说赢没赢？”
